bugs_found_and_fixed.bug: WhatYouOwePanel never mounted — zero API requests in Vercel runtime logs
bugs_found_and_fixed.fix: Removed 'import type' from route handler files in the client component. Route handlers import lib/amazon/client which uses Node.js crypto. Turbopack traverses the full module graph even for type-only imports — browser can't execute crypto, silent runtime error prevented mounting.

bugs_found_and_fixed.fix: Added FinancialEventGroupStartedAfter (180-day lookback) to finances.ts initial params. SP-API requires this param; builder omitted it from the initial params object.
